ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Sweet chilli corn-broad bean-mix (82%) (corn (37%), broad bean (27%), corn hoops (18%), sunflower oil, sweet chilli seasoning (3.5%) (demerara sugar, yeast extract, sugar, onion powder, garlic powder, natural flavouring, tomato powder, salt, modified starch, paprika powder, rubbed parsley, acid: citric acid, potato starch, chilli powder, chilli extract powder, dextrin, ground ginger, spice extract, colour: paprika extract, ground coriander seed, basil extract, ground fennel seed, vegetable oils [canola, coconut])), sweet chilli green peas (18%) (green peas (60%), corn starch, wheat flour, sunflower oil, sugar, sweet chilli seasoning (1.8%) (dextrose, sea salt, cayenne pepper, paprika powder, tomato powder, onion powder, garlic powder, ginger powder, lovage, jalapeno pepper powder), sea salt)
